title: alchemilla glaberrima var. firma
intro: Alchemilla glaberrima var. firma is a lesser-known variety of the Lady's Mantle plant, which is a perennial herb native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and astringent effects, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin irritations, and gastrointestinal issues. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and tannins, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial properties that may help reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair. Alchemilla glaberrima var. firma can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and support skin health.
